channel.title: Developer Tools on Badran Elshenawy
channel.description: Recent content in Developer Tools on Badran Elshenawy

item.title: Claude Series – Post 9: Plugins - The App Store Claude Code Was Missing!
item.description: Stop configuring everything manually! Claude Code’s plugin ecosystem gives you 9,000+ one-command installs that bundle skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers - from automated code review to real-time documentation injection.
